title: Uwchlwytho dogfennau ychwanegol
leadParagraph: cyYou can upload a document to support an application, or to show proof that you have done something.
paragraphShare: cyWe usually share anything you upload with the other party, for example your landlord, housing association or mortgage provider.
paragraphWithoutNotice: cyIf your application is ‘without notice’ (where you have asked us to consider your application without telling the other party) we will not share anything with them.
exampleBullet1: cyevidence that a judge has asked for, like bank statements showing your rent payments
exampleBullet2: cyphotographs of the property in a state of disrepair, like damp in the bathroom
exampleBullet3: cya report from an electrician or a plumber, showing evidence of a repair that needs to be done
exampleBullet4: cyemails or letters from the claimant (your landlord, housing association, or mortgage lender)
fileTypesIntro: cyYou can upload the following file types:
restrictions: cyYou cannot upload video or audio files.
